title: phyllanthus anfractuosus
intro: Phyllanthus anfractuosus, a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus anfractuosus include its ability to protect against liver damage, improve immune function, and reduce oxidative stress. Phyllanthus anfractuosus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, capsules, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
